lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has minor scratches and some paint fading. The interior shows noticeable wear on the upholstery. Mechanical components are currently functional.

Looking for a reliable way to get around without breaking the bank? This vehicle is in fair condition and is ready to be your next dependable daily driver! While it shows some expected wear and tear from its time on the road, it remains a solid choice for anyone seeking great value and functionality. It's a hardworking car that's eager for its next chapter with you!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic work to be fully roadworthy. The exterior shows significant signs of neglect, including heavy rust on the wheel wells, several large dents, and clear coat failure across most panels. Mechanically, the engine starts but has a noticeable knock and several fluid leaks, and the brakes are soft and in need of immediate replacement. Inside, the cabin shows heavy wear with torn upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and non-functional air conditioning. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a dedicated project vehicle or a source for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is priced to move for a buyer who prioritizes functionality over aesthetics. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scuffs on the bumpers and some clear coat peeling on the roof. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows significant wear on the driver's seat and a cracked dashboard. It runs and drives reliably, though it will soon require standard maintenance like new tires and a fluid flush. This is a solid, honest car for someone seeking dependable transportation at an accessible price point.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior have significant damage and heavy signs of wear. There are known mechanical and electrical issues that require immediate repair.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, reflecting a history of fastidious care and uncompromising preservation. An exemplary opportunity for the discerning enthusiast seeking a vehicle in its most pristine state.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this car to believe it. I’ve babied this beauty since day one, and it’s still looking and driving like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—not a scratch or a speck of dust to be found! I'm so sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely fall in love with it. Feel free to reach out with any questions or if you want to come take it for a spin!

Offering a museum-grade FD3S RX-7, featuring the iconic 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine with exceptional compression. This specimen retains its factory-spec double-wishbone suspension and Torsen limited-slip differential, delivering the precise, tactile feedback synonymous with Mazda’s front-midship architecture. The chassis is structurally immaculate, and the drivetrain operates with surgical precision through the five-speed manual gearbox. Boasting original paint and a pristine interior, this is a rare opportunity to acquire an unmolested example of 90s JDM engineering excellence.
Mint condition. One owner. No accidents. Clean title. Garage kept. Service records included. Inspections welcome.

Offered here is a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that presents in showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, glass-like luster, free of any swirls, chips, or imperfections, and has been protected with a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple without a single crease, and the original factory scent lingers. Every mechanical component has been meticulously maintained, with a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. This vehicle has been strictly garage-kept under a climate-controlled environment and has never seen inclement weather. For the buyer seeking a turn-key masterpiece that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line, this is the definitive example.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to a rigorous showroom standard. This motorcar exhibits a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile, representing the pinnacle of its class. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the immaculate exterior finish, underscores a history of meticulous care and uncompromising preservation. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly peerless example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute mint condition. This specimen represents the zenith of automotive preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom-state. Meticulously serviced and mechanically peerless, this automobile offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning professional. A rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine condition—it's basically like buying brand new without the dealership headache. I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service schedule. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh car feel. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and looks flawless, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This collector-grade specimen features a high-revving, naturally aspirated powerplant with a perfectly linear power band and zero deviation from factory compression specs. The drivetrain is anchored by a precision-gated manual transmission and a mechanical limited-slip differential, providing exceptional torque vectoring and tactile feedback. Every suspension component has been scrutinized, maintaining absolute chassis rigidity with zero bushing deflection or hydraulic weeping. The exterior retains its original factory luster with consistent paint depth readings, while the interior remains a pristine environment with no bolster wear or UV degradation on the trim. Mechanically flawless and architecturally sound, this is an uncompromising example for the discerning driver.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service records. No accidents. Inspection ready.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, maintained to a standard that rivals its first day on the showroom floor. This vehicle boasts a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a professional ceramic coating and free from any stone chips or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear or creasing, and every electronic feature functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been exclusively garage-kept and serviced ahead of schedule with a full documented history. This car comes with all original manuals, both keys, and the peace of mind that it has been cherished by a meticulous owner. It drives as tightly and smoothly as the day it was manufactured—a true collector-grade specimen.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to an exacting standard, it offers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of superior caliber.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen in pristine, showroom condition. Every detail reflects meticulous care, from the flawless exterior finish to the preserved interior. This is a definitive example of automotive excellence, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new.

Hey there! I'm honestly so excited to be passing along this absolute gem. It’s in truly pristine, mint condition—it basically looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve absolutely babied this car since day one, kept it garage-parked, and made sure it was meticulously cared for. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically flawless and ready for a new adventure, you’ve found it. Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'd love to chat!

This investment-grade Porsche 911 Carrera 4S is a superlative example of the 996.2 generation, featuring a meticulously maintained 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. The mechanical integrity is absolute, with a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a leak-free rear main seal. Its wide-body chassis retains factory-spec suspension geometry, ensuring the all-wheel-drive system delivers surgical turn-in and unwavering lateral grip. The exterior finish is concours-level, complemented by an interior devoid of typical bolster wear or switchgear delamination. Equipped with four-piston monoblock calipers and cross-drilled rotors, the braking performance remains sharp and fade-resistant. This is a rare, turn-key specimen for the discerning collector seeking peak analog feedback.
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Pristine interior. Full service records. No accidents.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish with zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, while the factory-original paint retains its brilliant luster. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, the dashboard is pristine, and every electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been strictly garage-kept and serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive maintenance history included. The engine bay is detailed and spotless, and the undercarriage reflects the same level of obsessive care. From the flawless alloy wheels to the untouched interior trim, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its model, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an immaculate specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle exemplifies the pinnacle of preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a commitment to quality, ensuring this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition.

Presenting a motorcar of peerless quality, preserved in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits meticulous maintenance and an uncompromising standard of care, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning professional. A rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such distinguished caliber and aesthetic integrity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service interval. If you’re looking for something that’s basically brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E92 M3 represents a superlative example of the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8, featuring individual throttle bodies and a 12.0:1 compression ratio for surgical throttle response. The longitudinal powerplant delivers linear torque through a precise 6-speed manual transmission to an M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis remains factory-rigid, equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a pristine undercarriage free of oxidation. Maintained to a concours standard, this investment-grade specimen includes documented rod bearing prophylaxis and Blackstone fluid analysis, ensuring the 8,400 RPM redline remains as robust as the day it left Regensburg.
Mint condition. Flawless original paint. Spotless leather interior. Full service history included. Mechanically perfect.

Step into automotive perfection with this impeccably maintained masterpiece. This vehicle presents in showroom condition, boasting a deep, glass-like finish on its original paint that has been protected by professional ceramic coating. Every curve is free of imperfections, and the wheels are entirely devoid of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains a time capsule; the premium leather seats retain their factory-fresh scent and firmness, showing absolutely no bolster wear. All electronics function with precision, and the climate control is ice-cold. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history and a powertrain that delivers smooth, exhilarating performance. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the best.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior environment that reflects a history of meticulous care. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such uncompromising quality and provenance.
